summary: Lead starts M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 after M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 closed on origin/main. This task is selected before M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 because the product-owner UI/localization directive and the accepted plan require the zh-CN versus zh-Hans locale-code risk to be resolved before localized UI polish depends on locale identifiers.

tests_run.result: main was clean and synchronized with origin/main before branch creation; branch feat/m7-i18n-foundation was created from 382439d0ab40b4ef6f7172473155c686d81c7ef7.
Ready tasks were M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001, M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001, and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.

decisions.decision: Start M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 first because the accepted UI/localization plan and source directive list i18n before design tokens, and design-token work depends on the locale-code decision not drifting.

risks.summary: Language selection must not mutate authoritative simulation state, save data, command history, AI decisions, or state hash.
risks.mitigation: Keep i18n in client/platform layers and require writer tests for language switching and hash/command boundaries.

requested_action: Implement M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 within allowed paths and produce writer REVIEW handoff.
